client_id.description: Apple Search Ads API client ID, used as client_id in the OAuth2 client_credentials token exchange. Never logged.

client_secret.description: Apple Search Ads API client secret, used as client_secret in the OAuth2 client_credentials token exchange. Never logged.

org_id.description: Apple Search Ads organization ID. Sent on every Campaign Management API request as the X-AP-Context: orgId=<org_id> header, matching legacy's requester's DefaultHeaders.

base_url.description: Apple Search Ads Campaign Management API base URL. Matches legacy's defaultBaseURL.

token_refresh_endpoint.description: Apple ID OAuth2 token endpoint override. Matches legacy's defaultTokenURL (legacy's literal default additionally carries grant_type/scope as query params on the URL itself; this bundle sends both as form fields on every token request instead via the oauth2_client_credentials auth mode + scopes, which is accepted identically by Apple's token endpoint regardless of whether the configured URL also repeats them as query params).

page_size.description: Records per page (offset/limit pagination), 1-1000. Matches legacy's defaultPageSize/maxPageSize.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages to read; 0, all, or unlimited exhausts the stream, matching legacy's maxPagesFor.
